sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ni khat, Ama min phatna van dim napi’n,
Leitung ah mawhna zan bang mial
manin;
Nungak sung suakin, Jesuh hong pai suk in,
Mi lak hong teng hi, lampha lak
dingin.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Nungta-in hong it, si-in hong hon hi,
Kivui-in ka mawhna a puakhia
hi;
Thokik in hong diksak, khawnkhong tawntung hi,
Lungdam huai bel hi, hong paikik ding
ni!

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ni khat, Kalvary mual kahto sak uh a,
Singtung kilhcip uh khailum
dinginah;
Mawhna teng pua in, simmawh, bawlsiat, huatna,
Nakpi thuaksak uh hi, kei hong
Tanpa.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ni khat, huan sung ah Amah kinusia a,
Ni khat, thuakna tawh pengin tawlnga
a;
Vantung mite in, a han hong cingsuk a,
Lam-et bei mite’ muan kei hong hon
Pa.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ni khat, Amah han in siin zo nawnlo a,
Han kong vangkhakna suangpi tukkhia
a;
Sihna zo gawpin, sihna pan thokik a,
Tu’n vantung kahzo, tawntung kei
Topa.

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Ni khat, Amah pengkul in hong masuan ding,
Ama vanglian vantung pan hong tang
ding;
Ka it ka ngaihte, Amah’n hong tonpih ding,
Angtan huai hi, tua Jesuh kei ading.
